category_title: Students who exhibit frustration through crying and self-abusive behavior during long tasks
scenario_title: Long reading task presented as a stapled packet
minimal_context: Shaun is sitting in his self-contained classroom at the beginning of an academic session, tasked with completing a stapled packet of reading worksheets.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is your stapled packet of reading worksheets for the beginning of our session. Please start working on them.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stares at the stapled packet of worksheets and begins whining)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just get started on the first page.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the packet away, exhibiting off-task behavior, and makes uninterpretable, garbled vocalizations)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying, you need to finish these worksheets.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Begins crying loudly, grunting, and engaging in self-abusive behavior)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is your stapled packet of reading worksheets for the beginning of our session. Please start working on them.

STUDENT: (Stares at the stapled packet of worksheets and begins whining)

TUTOR: Let's just get started on the first page.

STUDENT: (Pushes the packet away, exhibiting off-task behavior, and makes uninterpretable, garbled vocalizations)

TUTOR: Keep trying, you need to finish these worksheets.

STUDENT: (Begins crying loudly, grunting, and engaging in self-abusive behavior)

context.environment: self-contained classroom for severe emotional disturbance
context.materials: worksheets that were similar in content... presented all together at the beginning of the session in a stapled packet

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: presented with worksheets that were similar in content; however, these worksheets were presented all together at the beginning of the session in a stapled packet
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Whining, crying, grunting, and other noise making and uninterpretable, garbled vocalizations, and self-abusive behavior

behavior_patterns.condition: When a student is easily frustrated by the perceived length or volume of academic tasks
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Off-task behavior, Crying, whining, and self-abusive behavior
